description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a robust, angular design and a two-tone color scheme featuring a light gray slide and a black frame. The slide is adorned with diagonal serrations at the rear for improved grip and manipulation, and it features a prominent ejection port and a front sight post. The grip is ergonomically contoured with a textured black surface for secure handling, and the trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The frame includes a tactical accessory rail beneath the barrel, suitable for mounting lights or lasers. Markings and engravings are visible on the slide, indicating manufacturer and model details. The overall build suggests a firearm designed for reliability and tactical use in urban environments.
description: A modern, two-tone semi-automatic handgun with a textured black grip, light gray slide, and tactical accessory rail. Features include rear slide serrations, visible slide markings, and an ergonomic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the slide serrations, grip texture, trigger guard, and accessory rail.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the width of the slide and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, slide markings, and the overall symmetry of the handgun.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, rear sight, and the grip's contour.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced palm swell and a slightly flared base for improved retention. Its surface features a textured, stippled black pattern that enhances grip security, likely made from a durable polymer. The grip panels are integrated into the frame, with subtle finger grooves for comfort and control. No visible logos or embellishments are present, emphasizing a utilitarian, tactical appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large, rounded, and robust, providing ample space for gloved fingers. It has a smooth finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement, and its front edge is slightly squared off, which may aid in a two-handed grip. The guard is integrated seamlessly into the frame, contributing to the handgun's modern, tactical look.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length for a full-size handgun, with a straight, non-threaded profile and no visible compensators or porting. The exterior is finished in a matching light gray tone, consistent with the slide, and features a clean, unadorned appearance with no external fluting or threading.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features engraved diagonal serrations at the rear for improved grip, as well as visible text markings on both sides. On one side, there are manufacturer and model details, while the other side displays additional text, possibly indicating caliber or serial number. The markings are subtle but clearly legible, positioned just above the trigger area and towards the rear of the slide.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with a slight bevel for easier insertion and removal. It lacks any finger rest or extension, maintaining a streamlined profile. The base appears to be made of the same black polymer as the grip, with no visible logos or texturing.
